title: Sahni & Anderson-Freed's Contributions to Data Structures
description: A flowchart illustrating the foundational concepts and practical applications developed by Sartaj Sahni and Susan Anderson-Freed in the field of data structures.
relationships: Sahni's theoretical work provides the basis for algorithm design
Algorithm design informs the implementation of data structures
Anderson-Freed's educational frameworks teach practical implementation
Implementation knowledge is applied to real-world software engineering problems
Practical applications feed back into and refine theoretical foundations
